name: フラッピー Flappy
html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Flappy Bird Clone</title>
    <style>
        body { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 100vh; background: #70c5ce; font-family: 'Arial', sans-serif; }
        canvas { border: 2px solid #000; background-color: #70c5ce; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="gameCanvas" width="320" height="480"></canvas>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById("gameCanvas");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

// ゲーム設定
let bird = { x: 50, y: 150, w: 20, h: 20, gravity: 0.25, velocity: 0, jump: 4.5 };
let pipes = [];
let frame = 0;
let score = 0;
let gameActive = true;

// 操作イベント
function flap() {
    if (!gameActive) {
        resetGame();
    } else {
        bird.velocity = -bird.jump;
    }
}

window.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => { if (e.code === "Space") flap(); });
canvas.addEventListener("mousedown", flap);

function resetGame() {
    bird.y = 150;
    bird.velocity = 0;
    pipes = [];
    score = 0;
    frame = 0;
    gameActive = true;
    loop();
}

function loop() {
    if (!gameActive) return;

    // 背景・鳥の更新
    bird.velocity += bird.gravity;
    bird.y += bird.velocity;

    // 土管の生成 (100フレームごと)
    if (frame % 100 === 0) {
        let gap = 100;
        let minPipeHeight = 50;
        let pipeHeight = Math.floor(Math.random() * (canvas.height - gap - minPipeHeight * 2)) + minPipeHeight;
        pipes.push({ x: canvas.width, y: pipeHeight, w: 50 });
    }

    // 描画
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

    // 土管の移動と描画
    ctx.fillStyle = "#2ecc71";
    pipes.forEach((p, i) => {
        p.x -= 2;
        // 上の土管
        ctx.fillRect(p.x, 0, p.w, p.y);
        // 下の土管
        ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.y + 100, p.w, canvas.height);

        // 当たり判定
        if (bird.x + bird.w > p.x && bird.x < p.x + p.w &&
            (bird.y < p.y || bird.y + bird.h > p.y + 100)) {
            gameActive = false;
        }

        // スコア加算
        if (p.x + p.w === bird.x) score++;

        // 画面外に出た土管を削除
        if (p.x + p.w < 0) pipes.splice(i, 1);
    });

    // 地面・天井衝突判定
    if (bird.y + bird.h > canvas.height || bird.y < 0) gameActive = false;

    // 鳥の描画
    ctx.fillStyle = "#f1c40f";
    ctx.fillRect(bird.x, bird.y, bird.w, bird.h);

    // スコア表示
    ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
    ctx.font = "24px Arial";
    ctx.fillText(`Score: ${score}`, 10, 30);

    if (!gameActive) {
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)";
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = "#fff";
        ctx.fillText("GAME OVER", 90, 240);
        ctx.font = "16px Arial";
        ctx.fillText("Click to Restart", 105, 270);
    }

    frame++;
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
